title: Sceptridium japonicum
taxonomy: Sceptridium japonicum is classified as a species of fern in the family Ophioglossaceae. This species is part of the genus Sceptridium, which is a group of ferns commonly known as adder's tongues. The classification of Sceptridium japonicum is as follows: Kingdom - Plantae, Phylum - Pteridophyta, Class - Ophioglossopsida, Order - Ophioglossales, Family - Ophioglossaceae, Genus - Sceptridium, and Species - S. japonicum. Sceptridium japonicum is native to East Asia and is often found in woodland and mountainous areas. The classification of Sceptridium japonicum reflects its unique characteristics and evolutionary history.
